dvids.title: U.S. Forces Disable Vessel in Gulf of Oman Attempting to Violate Blockade
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. forces operating in the Gulf of Oman enforced blockade measures by disabling an Iranian-flagged unladen oil tanker attempting to sail toward an Iranian port at 9 a.m. ET, May 6.

dvids.title: CENTCOM Protects U.S. Warships Transiting Strait of Hormuz
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. forces intercepted unprovoked Iranian attacks and responded with self-defense strikes as U.S. Navy guided-missile destroyers transited the Strait of Hormuz to the Gulf of Oman, May 7.

dvids.title: U.S. Disables 2 More Vessels Violating Blockade in Gulf of Oman
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. forces disabled M/T Sea Star III and M/T Sevda, May 8, prior to both vessels entering an Iranian port on the Gulf of Oman in violation of the ongoing U.S. blockade.

dvids.title: U.S. Disables 2 More Vessels Violating Blockade in Gulf of Oman
dvids.desc: U.S. forces disabled M/T Sea Star III and M/T Sevda, May 8, prior to both vessels entering an Iranian port on the Gulf of Oman in violation of the ongoing U.S. blockade. (U.S. Central Command Video)

dvids.title: AFN Europe Report - May 8, 2026
dvids.desc:
U.S. Soldiers assigned to 1st Battalion, 12th Cavalry Regiment, trained members of the Lithuanian Riflemen's Union during a Leader Validation Exercise at Pabrade Training Area, Lithuania. 
 
Obangame Express, the largest multinational maritime exercise in West and Central Africa, concluded in Doua
